# Status

A status indicator component that displays a colored dot to represent the current state of an item.

## Import

```jsx
import { Status, StatusIndicator } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Status` | The root status container that includes a dot indicator and label. |
| `StatusIndicator` | The standalone status dot indicator. |

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `"info" \| "warning" \| "success" \| "error"` | `"info"` | The status value, which determines the indicator color. |

## Usage

### Basic Status

```jsx
<Status value="success">Active</Status>
```

### Status Variants

```jsx
<Status value="info">Pending</Status>
<Status value="warning">Degraded</Status>
<Status value="success">Operational</Status>
<Status value="error">Offline</Status>
```

### Standalone Indicator

```jsx
<StatusIndicator value="success" />
```
